testcase.name: verifyFeesAssignment

failure.message: The amount is not matching with the database expected [75667.0] but found [11210.0]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The amount is not matching with the database expected [75667.0] but found [11210.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:728) at testcase.name: verifyFeesAssignment

failure.message: The dropdown is missing. Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //input[@id='newtotalcost']/preceding-sibling::span' (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The dropdown is missing.
